init.title: Elisa Kotiakku Options
init.description: Configure battery capacity, tariff pricing, and power fee settings. When selecting a tariff preset, the grid transfer fees and tariff mode are automatically applied — you only need to configure retailer margins, taxes, and export fees manually.

data_description.battery_expected_usable_capacity_kwh: Usable capacity of your battery pack in kWh. Used for health, cycle, and backup-runtime estimates. Set to 0 to disable capacity-based analytics.
data_description.battery_monthly_cost: Monthly battery lease or instalment (osamaksu) cost in EUR. Used to calculate the first profitable day of each month. Akkureservihyvitys is subtracted from this value automatically. Set to 0 to disable or use total cost instead.
data_description.battery_total_cost: Total battery system cost in EUR. Used for payback period estimation. If monthly cost is not set, total cost ÷ 120 is used as the monthly cost.
data_description.akkureservihyvitys: Monthly compensation for allowing battery use in grid reserve (akkureservi). The service fee is waived when this is accepted. Subtracted from monthly cost in profitability calculations. Set to 0 if not applicable.
data_description.startup_backfill_hours: Hours of historical data to import automatically on startup. Set to 0 to disable automatic startup backfill.
data_description.tariff_preset: Select your grid operator's transfer tariff. Presets automatically set the tariff mode and grid transfer fees when saved. All other fields (retailer margins, taxes, export fees) must be configured manually.
data_description.tariff_mode: Controls how import pricing is structured. Automatically set by preset; override only with 'Custom'. 'Spot only' uses only spot price + margin. 'Flat' adds a single transfer fee. 'Day/Night' uses separate fees for 07–22 / 22–07. 'Seasonal Day/Night' uses winter daytime (Nov–Mar, Mon–Sat 07–22) vs other times.
data_description.import_retailer_margin: Retailer margin added to the spot price for grid imports. Used when tariff mode is 'Flat' or 'Spot only'. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually. Negative values represent discounts.
data_description.grid_import_transfer_fee: Grid transfer fee for imports in flat mode. Auto-set by preset when a flat preset is selected (e.g. Caruna Yleissiirto → 5.26 c/kWh). Enter the household-billing gross value.
data_description.day_import_retailer_margin: Daytime retailer margin for imports (07–22) with day/night mode, or winter daytime margin (Nov–Mar, Mon–Sat 07–22) with seasonal mode. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually.
data_description.night_import_retailer_margin: Nighttime retailer margin for imports (22–07) with day/night mode, or other-times margin with seasonal mode. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually.
data_description.day_grid_import_transfer_fee: Daytime grid import transfer fee (07–22) with day/night mode, or winter daytime fee with seasonal mode. Auto-set by preset when a day/night or seasonal preset is selected.
data_description.night_grid_import_transfer_fee: Nighttime grid import transfer fee (22–07) with day/night mode, or other-times fee with seasonal mode. Auto-set by preset when a day/night or seasonal preset is selected.
data_description.electricity_tax_fee: Fixed electricity tax on grid imports. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually. Enter the household-billing gross value.
data_description.export_retailer_adjustment: Adjustment applied to the spot price for grid exports. Negative values reduce export compensation. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually.
data_description.grid_export_transfer_fee: Grid transfer fee for exports. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually.
data_description.power_fee_rule: Method for calculating the estimated monthly power (demand) fee. Select 'None' to disable power fee tracking.
data_description.power_fee_rate: Monthly power fee rate per qualifying kW. Not auto-set by presets — always configure manually. Enter the household-billing gross value.

tariff_preset_expiring.title: Tariff preset nearing expiry
tariff_preset_expiring.description: The selected tariff preset {preset_name} is only intended for the dated snapshot window {valid_from} to {valid_until}. Review the preset or switch to Custom before it goes stale.

tariff_preset_expired.title: Tariff preset expired
tariff_preset_expired.description: The selected tariff preset {preset_name} was only intended for the dated snapshot window {valid_from} to {valid_until}. Review the preset or switch to Custom so transfer prices stay current.

options.custom: Custom — configure all tariff fields manually
options.caruna_night_2026_01: Caruna Oy Yösiirto — day 5.11 / night 3.12 c/kWh (eff. 2026-01)
options.caruna_night_seasonal_2026_01: Caruna Oy Kausisiirto — winter day 6.73 / other 3.23 c/kWh (eff. 2026-01)
options.caruna_espoo_night_2026_01: Caruna Espoo Yösiirto — day 5.11 / night 3.12 c/kWh (eff. 2026-01)

options.spot_only: Spot only — spot price + retailer margin, no transfer fee
options.flat: Flat — single transfer fee and retailer margin for all hours
options.day_night: Day / Night — separate fees for 07:00–22:00 and 22:00–07:00
options.seasonal_day_night: Seasonal Day / Night — winter daytime (Nov–Mar, Mon–Sat 07–22) vs other times

options.monthly_top3_all_hours: Monthly top 3 average — average of three highest hours
options.monthly_top3_winter_weekday_daytime: Monthly top 3 winter weekday daytime — Nov–Mar, Mon–Fri 07–22 only
